items.line_en: Good morning, welcome to the dream bank. How can I help you?

coach.say: Good morning, welcome to the dream bank. How can I help you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / welcome to the dream bank. / How can I help you?

items.line_en: Good morning. I would like to open a bank account.

coach.say: Good morning. I would like to open a bank account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning. / I would like to open a bank account.

items.line_en: Sure thing. What kind of account would you like to open? A savings account or a checking account?

coach.say: Sure thing. What kind of account would you like to open? A savings account or a checking account?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure thing. / What kind of account would you like to open? / A savings account or a checking account?

items.line_en: What's the difference?

coach.say: What's the difference?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the difference?

items.line_en: A checking account is designed to use for everyday transactions.

coach.say: A checking account is designed to use for everyday transactions.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A checking account is designed to use for everyday transactions.

items.line_en: Yet, the money in a savings account is meant to stay in the account and earn interest over time.

coach.say: Yet, the money in a savings account is meant to stay in the account and earn interest over time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yet, / the money in a savings account is meant to stay in the account and earn interest over time.

items.line_en: I see. Actually, I want to apply for a credit card. That's why I need an account.

coach.say: I see. Actually, I want to apply for a credit card. That's why I need an account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I see. / Actually, / I want to apply for a credit card. / That's why I need an account.

items.line_en: Okay then, you probably want a checking account.

coach.say: Okay then, you probably want a checking account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay then, / you probably want a checking account.

items.line_en: Well, thank you. I'd like that.

coach.say: Well, thank you. I'd like that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / thank you. / I'd like that.

items.line_en: Sure, we will have you fill out an application form, please.

coach.say: Sure, we will have you fill out an application form, please.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / we will have you fill out an application form, / please.

items.line_en: No problem.

coach.say: No problem.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No problem.

items.line_en: How much of a credit limit were you looking for?

coach.say: How much of a credit limit were you looking for?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How much of a credit limit were you looking for?

items.line_en: I would like a $10,000 spending limit.

coach.say: I would like a $10,000 spending limit.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I would like a $10,000 spending limit.

items.line_en: All right, we will see what we can do.

coach.say: All right, we will see what we can do.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right, / we will see what we can do.

items.line_en: We might be able to get you one of our gold cards with a $10,000 spending limit.

coach.say: We might be able to get you one of our gold cards with a $10,000 spending limit.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We might be able to get you one of our gold cards with a $10,000 spending limit.

items.line_en: Wonderful.

coach.say: Wonderful.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wonderful.

items.line_en: Will I also collect points when I use the card?

coach.say: Will I also collect points when I use the card?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Will I also collect points when / I use the card?

items.line_en: Sure, with our gold card you will get 10 reward points for every dollar spent.

coach.say: Sure, with our gold card you will get 10 reward points for every dollar spent.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / with our gold card you will get 10 reward points for every dollar spent.

items.line_en: Perfect. I have filled out the form.

coach.say: Perfect. I have filled out the form.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perfect. / I have filled out the form.

items.line_en: Do you need anything else?

coach.say: Do you need anything else?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you need anything else?

items.line_en: You just need to deposit a minimum of $250 until your new checking account.

coach.say: You just need to deposit a minimum of $250 until your new checking account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You just need to deposit a minimum of $250 until your new checking account.

items.line_en: Very well, here you are.

coach.say: Very well, here you are.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Very well, / here you are.

items.line_en: Thank you. Your account is set up now and your credit card will be mailed to your address

coach.say: Thank you. Your account is set up now and your credit card will be mailed to your address
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you. / Your account is set up now and your credit card will be mailed to your address

items.line_en: within 5 to 10 business days.

coach.say: within 5 to 10 business days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: within 5 to 10 business days.

items.line_en: Thank you for your help. Have a good day.

coach.say: Thank you for your help. Have a good day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for your help. / Have a good day.

items.line_en: You are welcome.

coach.say: You are welcome.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You are welcome.
